title: Fly Killer Bug Zapper, Fly Zapper Electric 2400V, 20W UV Fly Killers, Insect Killer Electric for Home Indoor and Outdoor, Mosquito Killer Lamp with Double-Sided Grid - 1 Pack
bullet_points: 【Upgraded Version Double-Sided Grid Fly Killer 】Insectaway's new generation fly zapper electric adopts the exclusive double-sided grid design, and the efficiency is increased to 2 times, The effective range of our fly zapper can reach 60m². The 20W UV mosquito killer lamp emits a wavelength of 365nm, which can effectively attract moths, flies, mosquitoes, and other insects, and the 2400V instantaneous high voltage kills mosquitoes in one second.

【Durable FSL UV Tube & Comes with 2 Spare Tubes】This fly zapper indoor with selected FSL UVA tubes, has a usage time of over 3000 hours, each electric fly killer set includes 2 spare FSL bulbs, worth £10. The light wave of the bug zapper is stable, with no splash screen, no glare, energy-saving, and environmental protection. The UV fly killer is EU CE and RoHS certified.

【Physical Mosquito-Killing, Safe, Eco-Friendly】Our fly zapper electric 360° traps mosquitoes and flies, pure physical pest control, no chemicals, no fumes, no smell, toxic-free, outstanding killing. This insect killer is covered with a protective grid to prevent your kids and pets from touching the internal electrified grid. Its detachable grid design also allows you to replace the bulbs conveniently.

【Durable & suitable for various occasions】 The electric insect killer is made of high-quality aluminum alloy material and equipped with a hanging chain, which is safe and firm, easy to disassemble, and can be used for both vertical and hanging purposes. It is suitable for various indoor scenes, such as kitchen, dining room, living room, office, and hotel. It protects an area of 60m² perfectly, providing you with a relaxing and peaceful environment free of mosquitoes.

【Simple and Hassle-Free Cleanup】 With this powerful electric insect killer, you no longer need to worry about clogs or having to scrape off grotesque dead bugs off of the unit. Insects are immediately zapped dead upon contact, falling in the removable hidden tray at the bottom of the unit. Simply remove the tray to dispose of the dead insects for quick and efficient cleaning!
